chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-1818 of 2025 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For orders on office objection. 2.For hearing of CMA No.9052/2025 3.For hearing of main case. 14.05.2025 Rana Sakhawat Ali, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for Respondent. Learned counsel presses his petition to the extent that the application of the petitioner available at page-55 be decided by the respondents expeditiously, preferably within a period of 30 days, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and in the meanwhile no further coercive action be taken their against. Learned counsel for the respondent has no cavil to the aforesaid and states that this petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
